hero.description: TechRuby delivers end-to-end technical implementations — from distributed backends and cloud-native DevOps to pixel-perfect frontends. We architect, build, and scale mission-critical systems.

backend.title: Backend Excellence
backend.description: Scalable, high-concurrency architectures, microservices, and distributed systems engineered for peak throughput.

devops.title: DevOps & Cloud-Native
devops.description: CI/CD automation, Kubernetes orchestration, and cloud-agnostic infrastructure as code.

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering
frontend.description: High-performance, pixel-perfect user interfaces and modern web applications.

distributed.title: Distributed Systems
distributed.description: Fault-tolerant clusters, consensus protocols, and globally distributed data layers.

data.title: Data Architecture
data.description: Optimized data pipelines, real-time analytics, and schema evolution at scale.

talent.title: Talent Ingestion & Academy
talent.description: Onboarding top-tier young talent from premium coding schools, mentored by our senior architects to deliver cost-effective engineering.

items.label: Data & Privacy Control
items.description: Deployed localized Formbricks survey platform and created a custom teaching hour logging dashboard, ensuring complete data sovereignty.

items.label: Transcoded Videos
items.description: Re-engineered a core transcoding pipeline using FFmpeg, Kubernetes horizontal pod autoscaling (HPA), and RabbitMQ/NSQ queues.

items.label: Uptime SLA
items.description: Re-architected legacy monoliths into distributed Go microservices with gRPC, Kafka, and Postgres, removing all single points of failure.

items.label: Peak concurrent users
items.description: Designed globally distributed caching tiers using Redis Cluster and localized CDN edge logic to handle massive sudden flash-sale traffic.

items.label: Real-time Telemetry
items.description: Ingested and analyzed telemetry data from thousands of vehicles using an NSQ messaging pipeline and ClickHouse database.

items.label: Compliance Ready
items.description: Implemented zero-trust cloud infrastructure using HashiCorp Terraform and Vault, with end-to-end encrypted databases (pgcrypto).

items.label: Response Limit
items.description: Programmed low-latency Go bidding services deployed on bare-metal servers using Traefik reverse proxies and Consul routing.

items.label: Peak Telemetry Ingestion
items.description: Engineered an IoT gateway using MQTT, Kafka event brokers, and TimescaleDB time-series storage to archive billions of events.

items.label: Queue Reliability
items.description: Constructed internal asset-tracking workflows leveraging NSQ queues, Docker environments, and microservices for automatic package classification.

items.label: Real-time Node Indexing
items.description: Constructed indexers in Rust to process node blocks, using NSQ to pipe structured logs into Elasticsearch cluster engines.

items.label: Bandwidth Compression
items.description: Created serverless image-processing pipelines on AWS Lambda utilizing the Sharp image optimization library, backing into S3.

items.label: Concurrent Classrooms
items.description: Orchestrated WebRTC media nodes with automatic autoscaling on Kubernetes clusters via custom operators to manage low-latency streaming.

items.label: Audit Trail Logging
items.description: Designed a strict double-entry ledger SQL schema in PostgreSQL using CQRS architecture pattern to enforce absolute account balancing.

items.label: Catalog Search Latency
items.description: Integrated Elasticsearch cluster search with Redis query cache to return instant catalog listings across multi-million SKU arrays.

items.label: Developer Efficiency
items.description: Built developer self-service templates deploying Kubernetes applications inside Istio service mesh, unified with Prometheus/Grafana.

items.label: Edge Response Time
items.description: Configured custom proxy routing rules in Traefik paired with Cloudflare Workers to validate JWT authentication tokens at edge locations.

steps.title: Deep Architectural Audit
steps.description: We map your entire system topology, identify bottlenecks, and produce a prioritized remediation roadmap.

steps.title: System Design & Blueprint
steps.description: Domain-driven design sessions produce scalable architecture diagrams, API contracts, and infrastructure plans.

steps.title: Precision Implementation
steps.description: Senior engineers build in iterative sprints with continuous integration, code review, and automated testing.

steps.title: Zero-Downtime Launch
steps.description: Blue-green deployments, feature flags, and canary releases ensure seamless production rollouts.

steps.title: Continuous Managed Scaling
steps.description: 24/7 observability, auto-scaling policies, and proactive incident response keep systems performant.

contact.title: Schedule your technical discovery
contact.description: Tell us about your infrastructure challenges. Our principal engineers will respond within one business day with a tailored assessment plan.

form.project_placeholder: Describe your technical challenges, timeline, and goals...
form.error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
form.success_desc: Our team will reach out to {email} shortly.

footer.brand_desc: Premium software engineering services for teams building mission-critical systems at scale.
footer.tagline: Built with precision. Deployed with confidence.

talentPipeline.title: A continuous flow of elite engineering talent
talentPipeline.description: We bridge top-tier academic training with enterprise production standards. By sourcing from premium academies like SalamRuby and mentoring young prodigies 1-on-1 with senior architects, we deliver world-class engineering that is uniquely cost-effective.

stages.title: Elite Sourcing (SalamRuby)
stages.description: We identify and recruit the most brilliant minds from SalamRuby Academy's intensive systems-programming curricula, ensuring high base technical capability.

stages.title: Architect Mentorship
stages.description: Every incoming junior engineer is paired with a Principal Architect. They work under rigorous pair-programming, lint checks, and strict architectural guidelines.

stages.title: Production-Grade Value
stages.description: The junior-architect hybrid model delivers enterprise-quality features at highly optimized costs. Complete continuous delivery, zero-downtime oversight.

engine.title: Data flows through precision-engineered pipelines
engine.description: Our methodology treats every system as a living pipeline — events propagate, services scale elastically, and deployments roll forward without interruption.
